LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF CHARLES FOSTER'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL: OFF CALENDAR; TO BE RENOTICED IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: CARL WOLF, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY CHARLES ALLEN FOSTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE OBJECTIONS TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION WERE MADE WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. SANCTIONS ARE AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $536.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
